title: PickUpTorches
description: Pick up torches by right-clicking it. It makes torches and lanterns 3d with a cool holding animation.
body:
Breaking a torch only to pick it up of the floor has annoyed me for so much time that I decided to make myself the mod since no one has done it.

This simple mod ~~give Steve functional hands~~ let you pick up torches by right clicking it with empty hand.

![https://i.imgur.com/HXDMQTI.gif](https://i.imgur.com/HXDMQTI.gif)

 

It works with redstone torches, inative redstone torches, soul torches, lanterns and soul lanterns too. Flowers and mushrooms included!
**Torches and lanterns renders as 3d items in the player hand, and player holds it properly (head level)**

 

This mod needs Player Animator 1.0.2

## **And please don't forget to check out my other mods**
